svg.title: Standard API rate index as of 2026-07-17
svg.desc: A dated index chart where Terra is 50 and Sol is 100 across recorded categories. This is a listed Standard API rate comparison only and excludes ChatGPT credits.
svg.text: Recorded source date: 2026-07-17 · index normalized to Sol = 100

g.text: Rate comparison only; not a bill, savings calculation, or usage prediction. Recheck the source before publishing. ChatGPT credits excluded.
